title: Update sigstore/rekor after https://github.com/sigstore/rekor/pull/1469
body:
```sh
go get github.com/sigstore/rekor@ad288b385a44bc45d328627679988e2c99cd5e0f
make vendor
```

+218-35242 lines of code in `vendor`.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

@Luap99, this PR should make you happy :)
/hold CI is not running this needs to be forced pushed to get it going.
I personally don’t think this is important enough to risk the force-push, but that’s of course up to you.
Let's play it safe and repush.

```
bin/podman           size= 57464648  delta=-1357392
bin/podman-remote    size= 42050056  delta=-1712272
```
